ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., restaurant, cafe, retail store) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the business */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the business is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the business */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the business belongs to */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the business belongs to */,
  "claimed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the business has been claimed */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the business has been verified by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES business_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES business_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review can be edited */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was deleted */,
  "business_response" TEXT /* Comment from the business in response to the review */,
  "business_response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the business responded to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the business type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_hours" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Time the business opens */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Time the business closes */,
  "is_open_24_hours" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the business is open 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_hours_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the photo */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the photo was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_photos_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the owner in the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_owners_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim */,
  "admin_reviewed" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the claim has been reviewed by an admin */,
  "admin_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the admin regarding the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_claims_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review can be edited */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review has been deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the business */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the business's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the business joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the business's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the business's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the business account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the business account is an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_accounts_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used by the business */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_payments_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was started */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription expires */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription will be renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_subscriptions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., website, app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_analytics_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_by_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification was sent by an admin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_business_notifications_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
